title: PICKING_MODE bailout cuts hover cost
description: Early-returning from the plasma fragment shader during the picking pass drops hover-frame cost across every tested GPU.
highlights: Picking pass early-returns from the plasma shader when PICKING_MODE is set
Hover-frame readback cost down ~1.3x on RTX-class GPUs, ~2x on older Intel
Hover state cached so identical-target moves skip the readback entirely
learnings: readPixels cost is dominated by the queued GPU work it waits on, not the read
The bailout's speedup scales inversely with pipeline efficiency
